name: current-2024-2026-residual-tree
description: Broad 2024-2026 test of shallow boosted nonlinear residual correction against the current residual-ridge default.

notes: This checks whether nonlinear residual thresholds generalize across 2024-2026 rather than merely fitting the current 2026 score environment.
All residual corrections are trained from prior residuals only and are therefore no-future in replay.
